positive: A dramatic, cyberpunk cityscape illustration viewed from above. Flying vehicles zip between towering skyscrapers covered in glowing neon signs and holographic advertisements. Rainy atmosphere, high contrast, deep shadows, cinematic, highly detailed, concept art, cinematic lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, peaceful, daylight, soft focus
